tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Going To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Going To का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I am going to do this work tomorrow. She is going to become a doctor. We are going to change our house next month. They are going to get married. Are you going to go out today?

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Going To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Going To का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I am going to buy this book. He is going to travel next week. We are going to start a new business. I am going to think about this. She is going to finish this project.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "क्या वे कल आने वाले हैं?"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Are they going to come tomorrow?

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "They is going to get married."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They are going to get married.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Going To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Going To का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He is going to give an interview. We are going to watch a movie tomorrow. I am not going to repeat this mistake. She is going to buy her own house.
